title: Operation Manager
description:
Job Summary

The Operation Manager is responsible for overseeing and managing the company’s day-to-day operations to ensure efficiency, consistency, and profitability. This role focuses on operational excellence, team management, cost control, and compliance with company standards and Singapore regulatory requirements.

Key Responsibilities

1. Daily Operations Management

  • Oversee and manage daily operational activities across stores/departments

  • Ensure all operational processes, SOPs, and service standards are properly implemented

  • Coordinate operations between frontline teams and support functions (HR, Finance, Procurement, etc.)

2. Performance & KPI Management

  • Set, monitor, and achieve operational KPIs (sales, cost control, productivity, customer satisfaction)

  • Analyze operational data and reports, identify issues, and implement improvement plans

  • Drive execution of new policies, procedures, and operational initiatives

3. Team Management & Development

  • Manage and support Store Managers / Supervisors

  • Conduct performance evaluations and support staff development and training

  • Handle employee discipline, grievances, and conflict resolution in compliance with MOM regulations

4. Cost Control & Resource Optimization

  • Monitor labor costs, inventory usage, and operational expenses

  • Optimize manpower planning, scheduling, and productivity

  • Work closely with suppliers and vendors to ensure operational efficiency

5. Customer Experience & Brand Standards

  • Ensure consistent customer service quality and brand standards

  • Handle escalated customer complaints and operational issues

  • Continuously improve service quality and customer experience

6. Compliance & Risk Management

  • Ensure operations comply with Singapore regulations (MOM, NEA, workplace safety, hygiene, etc.)

  • Support audits, inspections, and government authority checks

  • Identify operational risks and manage incidents effectively

Job Requirements

Education & Experience

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Business Management, Hospitality, F&B Management, or related fields

  • Minimum 3–5 years of operational management experience (F&B, retail, or chain operations preferred)

  • Experience managing multiple outlets or teams is an advantage

Skills & Competencies

  • Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills

  • Good analytical and problem-solving abilities

  • Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment

  • Good understanding of Singapore employment regulations and basic HR compliance

Language

  • Proficient in English & Mandarin

    (spoken and written)

Personal Attributes

  • Results-driven and detail-oriented

  • Strong sense of ownership and accountability

  • Able to lead, motivate, and develop teams effectively

Work Location

Singapore (required to travel between outlets/sites as needed)
